calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2020 Off Calendar

Specially Appearing Defendant Sea Pac Transport Services, Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Action On The Ground Of Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Specially Appearing DEFENDANT SEA PAC TRANSPORT SERVICES, LLC.'s Motion To Quash Service Of Summons For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Stay Or Dismiss Action On The Ground Of Forum Non Conveniens.

Ordered off calendar. Non-opposition to motion to quash service of summons filed August 18, 2020 and request for dismissal of entire case filed August 21, 2020.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
